title: Support schema
description: Schema for support provided to an organization

contributionStartDate.description: Property. Date on which the support was authorized or provided, in ISO 8601 format

contributionEndDate.description: Property. Date on which the support ended, in ISO 8601 format; omitted while support is ongoing

financialSupport.description: Property. Financial support provided, normally expressed in euros

logisticalSupport.description: Property. Descriptions of the logistical support provided

personnelSupport.description: Property. Number of people made available to support the organization

name.description: Property. Name of the organization providing the support

refSupportedOrganization.description: Relationship. Reference to the organization receiving the support
